macros.name: corepcorr
macros.formula: direct read; 7-seed mean at peak layer (L8)

macros.name: coreoc
macros.formula: direct read; output-controlled residual at peak layer

macros.name: hardsagree
macros.formula: mean of 20-seed pairwise Spearman seed-agreement values

macros.name: rawspearman
macros.formula: direct read; raw Spearman, no controls

macros.name: softmaxonly
macros.formula: direct read; partial Spearman controlling for max softmax only

macros.name: stdcontrol
macros.formula: direct read; partial Spearman controlling for max softmax + activation norm

macros.name: entropycontrol
macros.formula: direct read; standard control + logit entropy

macros.name: nonlincontrol
macros.formula: direct read; partial Spearman after nonlinear MLP control on [softmax, norm]

macros.name: gptOcMin
macros.description: min fixed-bottleneck OC across 4 GPT-2 sizes

macros.name: gptOcMax
macros.description: max fixed-bottleneck OC across 4 GPT-2 sizes

macros.name: qwenOcMin
macros.description: min OC across 6 Qwen base sizes

macros.name: qwenOcMax
macros.description: max OC across 6 Qwen base sizes

macros.name: qFourteensagree
macros.description: Qwen 14B seed agreement, cited in appendix A.2

macros.name: llamapcorr
macros.formula: direct read; 7-seed mean at peak layer

macros.name: pythiaOneSixtypcorr
macros.formula: direct read; highest healthy in Pythia controlled suite

macros.name: pythiaFourTenpcorr
macros.formula: direct read; collapsed configuration (24L/16H, smaller hidden)

macros.name: pythiaFourTenstd
macros.formula: direct read; 7-seed std at peak layer for Pythia 410M

macros.name: pythiaTwoEightpcorr
macros.formula: direct read; lowest healthy in Pythia controlled suite

macros.name: pyFourTenOC
macros.formula: direct read; output-controlled residual at peak layer for Pythia 410M

macros.name: pyOneFourOC
macros.formula: direct read; output-controlled residual at peak layer for Pythia 1.4B

macros.name: pyOneFourDedOC
macros.formula: direct read; output-controlled residual at peak layer for Pythia 1.4B deduped

macros.name: pythiaOneEarliestpcorr
macros.formula: direct read; partial_corr.mean at earliest measured checkpoint (step 256) of Pythia 1B dynamics

macros.name: pythiaOneEarliestOC
macros.formula: direct read; output_controlled.mean at earliest measured checkpoint (step 256) of Pythia 1B dynamics

macros.name: pythiaOneFourEarliestpcorr
macros.formula: direct read; partial_corr.mean at earliest measured checkpoint (step 256) of Pythia 1.4B dynamics

macros.name: pythiaOneFourEarliestOC
macros.formula: direct read; output_controlled.mean at earliest measured checkpoint (step 256) of Pythia 1.4B dynamics

macros.name: pythiaOneFourMidpcorr
macros.formula: direct read; partial_corr.mean at step 1000 checkpoint of Pythia 1.4B dynamics

macros.name: pythiaOneFourMidOC
macros.formula: direct read; output_controlled.mean at step 1000 checkpoint of Pythia 1.4B dynamics

macros.name: pythiaOneFinalOC
macros.formula: direct read; output_controlled.mean at final measured checkpoint (step 143000) of Pythia 1B dynamics

macros.name: pythiaOnePerplexity
macros.formula: direct read; perplexity at final measured checkpoint (step 143000) of Pythia 1B dynamics

macros.name: pythiaOneFourPerplexity
macros.formula: direct read; perplexity at final measured checkpoint (step 143000) of Pythia 1.4B dynamics

macros.name: pythiapermp
macros.formula: exact one-sided permutation p-value: P(observed gap | random 6-vs-2 partition); paired with Mann-Whitney U=0

macros.name: pythiahealthyminR
macros.formula: min over scope, rounded to 2 dp; equals 0.21 from Pythia 2.8B

macros.name: pythiacollmean
macros.formula: mean of partial_corr.mean across the 2 collapsed configurations in the 8-size suite

macros.name: pythialoomingap
macros.formula: min over leave-one-out trials of (min(healthy) - max(collapsed)); 9-suite excludes 1.4B-deduped, 8-size LOO

macros.name: qwenrangehi
macros.description: Qwen family max (0.5B-32B), rounded via 3dp to match table display

macros.name: qSevenCfourWithin
macros.formula: direct read; C4-train -> C4-test ρpartial on Qwen 7B

macros.name: coreocstd
macros.formula: direct read; output-controlled std for GPT-2 124M at canonical layer 8

macros.name: saefeatures
macros.description: SAE feature count (with thin LaTeX space)

macros.name: pythiaobsgap
macros.formula: min(healthy) - max(collapsed) over the 8-size partition; full-data observed gap

macros.name: shaptotalpct
macros.formula: direct read; rounded to integer percentage

macros.name: shapresidpct
macros.formula: direct read; rounded to integer percentage

macros.name: pcaOneCosine
macros.formula: direct read; cosine of probe direction with PC1 at GPT-2 124M layer 8

macros.name: cfourretainmin
macros.description: min C4 retention pct across cross-domain table

macros.name: cfourretainmax
macros.description: max C4 retention pct across cross-domain table

macros.name: llamaEightCfourWithin
macros.formula: direct read; C4-train -> C4-test ρpartial on Llama 8B

macros.name: rawspearmanlo
macros.description: raw Spearman min across all models

macros.name: rawspearmanhi
macros.description: raw Spearman max across all models

macros.name: entropyabsorbpct
macros.description: marginal entropy control absorption, pct of standard control

macros.name: nmodels
macros.description: models in cross-family F-test scope (Pythia excluded)

macros.name: loofweakestfamily
macros.description: family whose removal yields largest leave-one-out p

macros.name: confabsorbmean
macros.formula: mean over scope of (none - standard) / none * 100

macros.name: confabsorbstd
macros.formula: sample std (ddof=1) over scope of (none - standard) / none * 100

macros.name: confabsorbmin
macros.formula: min over scope of (none - standard) / none * 100

macros.name: confabsorbmax
macros.formula: max over scope of (none - standard) / none * 100

macros.name: shufflegptz
macros.description: Gaussian z-score, real vs shuffle null (sample std, n=10)

macros.name: mlppooldelta
macros.description: MLP pooled mean delta across 10 models

macros.name: tostPvalue
macros.description: paired TOST p-value, n=10 model deltas, margin ±0.03

macros.name: tostCIlo
macros.description: 90% CI lower bound on pooled mean delta

macros.name: tostCIhi
macros.description: 90% CI upper bound on pooled mean delta

macros.name: llamaThreeNLlin
macros.formula: direct read; held-out test split with HP selected on validation

macros.name: llamaThreeNLmlp
macros.description: Llama~3B swept MLP test at L0
macros.formula: direct read; swept-HP MLP, HP selected on validation, evaluated on test

macros.name: llamacoef
macros.description: Llama family coef, cited in architecture.tex

macros.name: exdimSeedStdLow
macros.description: seed std at 150 ex/dim (Qwen~0.5B), measurement-precise but signal-weak

macros.name: xfamCompTol
macros.description: cross-family pcorr tolerance under layer choice

macros.name: residGptRef
macros.formula: direct read; canonical reference rho for the residualizer-fit split body table

macros.name: residGptSplit
macros.formula: direct read; rho with OLS residualizer fit on disjoint pool R

macros.name: residPyOneRef
macros.formula: direct read; canonical reference rho for Pythia 1B in the body table

macros.name: residPyOneSplit
macros.formula: direct read; rho with OLS residualizer fit on disjoint pool R

macros.name: residPyOneFourRef
macros.formula: direct read; canonical reference rho for Pythia 1.4B in the body table

macros.name: residPyOneFourSplit
macros.formula: direct read; rho with OLS residualizer fit on disjoint pool R

macros.name: residLlamaRef
macros.formula: direct read; canonical reference rho for Llama 3.2 3B in the body table

macros.name: residLlamaSplit
macros.formula: direct read; rho with OLS residualizer fit on disjoint pool R

macros.name: residSplitMaxDelta
macros.description: max |split - direct| across 4 models within direct comparison
macros.formula: max |delta_rho| across the 4 residualizer-split JSONs (within direct comparison: split.mean - main.mean)
